body:
- [x] Add EC:1.1.1.358 2-dehydropantolactone reductase as exactMatch to GO:0036441 2-dehydropantolactone reductase activity
- [x] Add/make EC:1.17.3.2 broadMatch xref on GO:0070675 hypoxanthine oxidase activity and GO:0004855 xanthine oxidase activity
- [x] Also, add [RHEA:68012](https://www.rhea-db.org/rhea/68012) as exactMatch xref on GO:0070675 hypoxanthine oxidase activity, and use as def xref.
- [x] Add EC:1.14.14.24 to GO:0030343 vitamin D3 25-hydroxylase activity (and change name to 'vitamin D 25-hydroxylase activity' to match EC and other similar GO terms)
title: Missing EC/RHEA xrefs to add to oxidoreductase activity GO terms
